name: Auth & JWT
about: Login, signup, session tokens (Django API + React)
title: "[Auth] "
assignees: []

## Scope
- Secure login / sign-up flows against the assessment API (Django).
- JWT issuance, validation, expiry handling on the client.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Invalid credentials show clear feedback (no stack traces to user).
- [ ] Authenticated requests send Bearer token; 401 handled (redirect / message).
- [ ] Matches PRD/SDD for auth-related URLs.
